summary: Completed comprehensive testing of InsureHub AI notification system. Backend API tests passed 13/13 including AI notification generation, endorsement workflows, and email integration. Frontend testing verified login, navigation, and form functionality with minor modal overlay issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Modal overlay intercepts click events on Approve button
ui_bugs.workaround: Use force=True in automation or click outside modal first

passed_tests: Endorsement submission with AI email to admins
Endorsement approval with AI email to HR
WhatsApp message generation with emojis and formatting
